rounds.implementation_report:
Implemented Goal `00000SZ2A9V2FG1VXVDM1YW007`; the worktree is ready for Refine’s review handoff.

After-action report:

- Changed [toolbar.js](/home/buddy/projects/refine-next/.git/refine-worktrees/refine-00000SZ2A9V2FG1VXVDM1YW007-round-1/src/surfaces/web/static/js/features/toolbar.js:868) so supervisor polling updates only its status area instead of rebuilding the entire toolbar.
- This preserves typed prompt text, conversation DOM, and scroll position. Supervisor event scrolling is also retained.
- Added regression coverage in [web_supervisor_toolbar.test.js](/home/buddy/projects/refine-next/.git/refine-worktrees/refine-00000SZ2A9V2FG1VXVDM1YW007-round-1/tests/web_supervisor_toolbar.test.js:325).

Exact verification outcomes:

- `node --test tests/web_supervisor_toolbar.test.js` — passed, 7/7 tests, 0 failures.
- `cargo run --manifest-path xtask/Cargo.toml -- test-browser` — passed, 9/9 tests, 0 failures.
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check` — passed, exit code 0.
- `git diff --check` — passed, exit code 0.
- Final scope: 2 modified files, both directly related to the fix.

Goal-agent usage: 150,259 tokens over approximately 6 minutes 33 seconds.
rounds.prompt: There's a UI bug in the supervisor tab where you try to type in the prompt input, but the browser re-renders and removes the user's text and moves the scrollbar. Fix.
